name: Slack

rateLimits.scimApi: Rate limited (HTTP 429 returned when exceeded, specific limits not publicly documented)
rateLimits.webApi: Varies by tier: Tier 1 (1 req/min), Tier 2 (20 req/min), Tier 3 (50 req/min), Tier 4 (100 req/min)
rateLimits.eventsApi: 30,000 events per workspace per app per 60 minutes

scim.notes: SCIM API requires Business+ or Enterprise Grid plan. OAuth token with 'admin' scope required. Supports Users and Groups schemas.

sdk.notes: The @slack/web-api package covers the Web API. SCIM operations are done via direct HTTP calls; there is no official npm package for the SCIM API in JavaScript.

webhooks.registrationEndpoint: Configured via Slack App settings (Event Subscriptions)
webhooks.notes: Events API delivers events via HTTP POST to a configured Request URL. Scopes control which events you can subscribe to.

sandbox.notes: Slack Developer Program provides free Enterprise Grid sandbox environments. Up to 2 active sandboxes at a time, each with up to 3 workspaces and 8 users. Active for 6 months. No cost.

needs_verification: Exact SCIM API rate limits (not publicly documented in detail)
Whether SCIM DELETE truly deactivates or can also permanently remove users
